evals.prompt: Please review this draft for AI tells before I post it on Reddit: 'I'm excited to share that we've leveraged a robust microservices architecture to deliver seamless, scalable solutions that empower our customers to navigate their cloud journey.'
evals.expected_output: Identifies P0/P1 vocabulary hits (excited, leveraged, robust, seamless, scalable, empower, navigate as metaphor), proposes a rewrite stripped of those terms, and copies the rewrite to clipboard.

assertions.text: Skill flags 'excited to share' as P0 chatbot artifact
Skill flags 'leveraged' and 'robust' as Tier 1 vocabulary
Skill flags 'navigate' as a metaphor banned word
Skill copies the final output to clipboard via pbcopy/xclip/clip.exe

evals.prompt: Quick rhythm check: 'I went to the store. I bought some bread. I went home. I ate the bread.'
evals.expected_output: Skill flags structural rhythm uniformity (4 sentences of similar length), suggests varying sentence lengths.
